title: How I Used Claude Code to Build a $481k App
summary: Austin Marchese shares a case study of using Claude Code to build a product that generated $481k annually, going from zero code to a polished codebase in 45 days with someone lacking coding experience. The video outlines five steps for shipping fast, including problem definition, engineering strategy, vocabulary learning, smooth iteration, and identifying breaking points.
